# Kashyap Prajapati - Professional Profile & Portfolio Context
> This file (`llms.txt`) is designed to provide Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents with comprehensive context about Kashyap Prajapati, his portfolio repository, professional experience, technical capabilities, and projects.

## 1. Professional Overview
Kashyap Prajapati is a versatile Full-Stack Developer, Backend Engineer, and DevOps Enthusiast based in Gujarat, India (Zip: 387002). He specializes in building robust backend infrastructures, streamlining DevOps pipelines, and crafting seamless mobile and web application experiences. 

His defining professional philosophy: *"I get a real kick out of building things that work smoothly behind the scenes — the kind of stuff most people don't see, but everything depends on."*

Currently pursuing a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) at The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda, Kashyap combines academic rigor with hands-on, production-level engineering experience.

## 2. Core Competencies & Technical Arsenal
Kashyap possesses a broad and deep technical stack, allowing him to operate effectively across the entire software development lifecycle:

### Backend & API Development
- **Languages:** Node.js, Python, Go, Java, C#, C++, C, PHP
- **Frameworks:** Express.js, Fastify, FastAPI, Spring Boot, Spring, .NET
- **API Technologies:** RESTful APIs, GraphQL, Socket.IO
- **Core Skills:** Microservices architecture, API design, authentication/authorization (JWT), performance optimization.

### Database Technologies
- **NoSQL:** MongoDB, Redis
- **SQL/Relational:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server, SQLite, MariaDB
- **ORMs/Tools:** Prisma
- **BaaS Solutions:** Supabase, Appwrite, Firebase

### Frontend & Web Development
- **Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3
- **Frameworks/Libraries:** ReactJS, Next.js, Bootstrap
- **Styling/UI:** Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- **State Management:** Redux, Zustand, TanStack Query

### Mobile & Desktop Development
- **Mobile:** React Native, Android (Native)
- **Desktop:** ElectronJS, PyQt, AWT
- **Other:** Progressive Web Apps (PWAs), Browser Extensions

### DevOps, Cloud & Tooling
- **Infrastructure & Containerization:** Docker, Linux server management
- **CI/CD & Version Control:** Git, GitHub, GitHub Actions
- **Process Management & Build Tools:** PM2, Webpack, NPM
- **Testing & API Tools:** Jest, Postman
- **Data/Media Processing:** FFmpeg, Streamlit
- **Design:** Figma

## 3. Professional Experience

### InfoDesk | Full Stack Developer Intern
*Jan 2026 – May 2026 | Vadodara, Gujarat (On-site)*
- **Role & Impact:** Contributed to building and optimizing scalable enterprise-grade applications.
- **Backend & Infrastructure:** Developed high-performance backend services using **FastAPI** and **MongoDB**. Deployed and managed cloud infrastructure on **AWS**, ensuring reliability and scalability of production systems.
- **Frontend & Integration:** Built modern frontend interfaces utilizing **Next.js** and **Radix UI**. Integrated advanced search capabilities leveraging **OpenSearch**.
- **Methodology:** Collaborated with cross-functional teams in an Agile environment to deliver impactful features and continuous platform improvements.

### Skynet Global Systems | Backend Developer Intern
*Dec 2023 – Mar 2024 | Nadiad, Gujarat (On-site)*
- **Role & Leadership:** Led a 2-member development team, driving timely delivery, ensuring code quality, and managing successful feature deployment in a live production environment.
- **Technical Execution:** Built scalable systems using the **MERN stack**. Designed and developed secure RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express. Managed database operations and complex queries in MongoDB.
- **Best Practices:** Handled secure authentication processes, gained hands-on experience with advanced Git workflows, and implemented performance optimization strategies within an Agile framework.

## 5. Portfolio Repository Structure
This repository (`f:\portfolio`) serves as Kashyap's progressive web application (PWA) portfolio:
- `index.html`: The primary single-page application entry point, utilizing semantic HTML and SEO best practices (including Schema.org JSON-LD and Open Graph tags).
- `assets/`: Contains custom CSS, JavaScript animations (Particles.js, Vanilla Tilt, ScrollReveal), and image assets.
- `skills.json`: A structured data file enumerating 60+ technical skills with associated icons.
- `manifest.json` / `sw.js`: Configurations enabling full PWA installability and offline support.
- `projects/`: Subdirectory for detailed project showcases.
